relations.note: Headline styling and container styling together define the full chart section presentation.
Emphasis colors reserved for key figures reinforce the visual hero treatment of statistical callout figures.

quotes: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar
Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Keep charts visually consistent, clean, and on-brand.
rules.rule_text: Chart/infographic containers use uniform rounded corners (chart.container.radius, 12px) with a Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel fill and a rounded Brand Blue (#00529b) header bar, kept clean and easy to scan and consistent with the broader system. Bars and chart icons use the same rounded, approachable shape language (rounded bar tops).

effect.reserved_for: emphasis on key figures/data points only
effect.subject: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) in charts

quotes: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only
Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.

rules.intent: Preserve chart color hierarchy so emphasis colors retain meaning and placebo data stays visually de-emphasized.
rules.rule_text: Chart color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b, chart.primary.color) and Sky Blue (#358CCB, chart.data.secondary_color) are the dominant chart colors; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) are reserved strictly for emphasis on key figures/data points and must not be used as general chart colors. Placebo/comparator series use neutral gray.

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Give charts a consistent, brand-aligned headline treatment across media.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines are set in Agenda (print) or Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), in ALL CAPS, colored Brand Blue (#00529b), with a thin Gold (#ffc60a) rule beneath the headline.

quotes: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**
Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.

rules.intent: Ensure the key statistic dominates visual hierarchy over supporting context.
rules.rule_text: In statistical callouts within charts, the % figure is the visual hero and is set large and bold, while supporting copy sits beneath it in a lighter weight.

quotes: Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.
Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Keep footnotes visually subordinate and distinguishable from primary chart data.
rules.rule_text: Chart footnotes must be noticeably smaller than primary data text and clearly separated from it, using the footnote type scale (chart.footnote.type).
